query_normalized: investigating the impact of network centrality on the consolidation of motor memories neuroscience
rationale: This paper satisfies inclusion criterion (b) because it measures the user's independent variable (network centrality/hub status) within the same domain (neuroscience/brain networks), providing relevant empirical and methodological context for centrality metrics in brain connectivity studies even though the dependent variable (seizure outcomes) differs from the user's focus (motor memory).
